title: pteroneurum glaucum
intro: Pteroneurum glaucum, a type of plant native to India, is also known as the 'Blue Water Lily' or 'Glaucous Pteroneurum.' The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pteroneurum glaucum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use, although I couldn't find more specific information about its herbal preparations.
